ddls:
CREATE TABLE "domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the domain (e.g., Clinical Trials, Biochemical Assays) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the domain */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the domain was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the domain was last updated */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the domain is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the domain the model belongs to */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the model */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model the run belongs to */,
  "run_name" TEXT /* Name of the run */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date the run was executed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the run (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the run started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the run ended */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the run in seconds */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Text for any error messages encountered during the run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_runs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the run the metric belongs to */,
  "fh" REAL /* Fraction of hits (FH) */,
  "mse_jack" REAL /* Mean squared error with jackknife (MSE_jack) */,
  "mse_wjack" REAL /* Mean squared error with weighted jackknife (MSE_wjack) */,
  "variance" REAL /* Variance of the model predictions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES model_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_types" (
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric type */,
  "metric_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric type (e.g., FH, MSE_jack) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric value */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the run the value belongs to */,
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric type */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_metric_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_type_id") REFERENCES metric_types ("metric_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES model_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the run */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the run was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES model_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research note */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the run the note belongs to */,
  "note_title" TEXT /* Title of the note */,
  "note_content" TEXT /* Content of the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the note was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the note was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the note */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_notes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_notes_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES model_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_notes_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the run the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who set the parameter */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_parameters_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES model_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_parameters_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_parameters_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model the file belongs to */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., code, data, results) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who uploaded the file */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_files_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_files_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_files_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "run_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the run the file belongs to */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., results, logs) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who uploaded the file */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_run_files_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_run_files_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES model_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_run_files_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the permission belongs to */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model the permission applies to */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the run the permission applies to */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the permission */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES model_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
